parameters: There's a warm, glowing light. Fully restore the party?
The party's HP and MP has been fully restored!
This patch of wall's a different color from the rest.
You broke out? I like your spunk, but keep me out of it.
It's so boring in here. Well, not that it'd be any less boring outside.
Thanks for opening the door, but I'm just going to stay in here.
This cell's weirdly drafty and cold.
The toilet bowl's strangely wobbly. Try moving it?
This is the cell belonging to the guy who spoke to me when I first
He dug this out while pretending to sit around wallowing in pity,
huh? Just what was he up to? Should we check it out?
It's a book that lists the never-ending rules the slaves have to follow.
I haven't done anything wrong... I was framed... There was nothing
There are sludges and doros popping up all over the place.
Every time you change rooms, they magically reappear.
A sludge ate my one working knife. I was terrified my master would
Where'd the guy who was in here go? We should check around.
Nice item. Makes this trip worthwhile... Hmm?
The guy in the other cell... He's gone?
If the serial killer goes on a rampage, I'll take care of it!
I'll unleash my sludge army on her!
